understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the player to the goal gem tile marked '+', avoiding spikes, within the attempt/turn limits, then continue clearing subsequent levels until the game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) or CLICK/UNDO. After a horizontal move, the character automatically continues moving in the current gravity direction until it lands on a solid/support tile (o/m/w), reaches the goal '+', or hits a hazard. Landing on spikes (u/v) ends the attempt immediately. CLICK removes/interacts with clickable tiles such as breakable blocks 'x' at a specified [x,y] target and does not consume movement in platform-timer contexts. UNDO reverts the previous action. Planning uses the provided landing previews (left_landing/right_landing) and corridor_scan to choose safe moves toward passage columns (large y-level changes) and use clicks to open blocked fall paths.
